entities.name: TOTAL N DETERMINATION
entities.description: The process of measuring the total amount of nitrogen in soil samples.

entities.name: NITROGEN BALANCE RESEARCH
entities.description: Research aimed at understanding the input and output of nitrogen in a system.

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil characterized by specific mineralogical and chemical properties.

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: A type of clay-rich soil that shrinks and swells.

entities.name: DISTILLATION OF A CLEAR ALIQUOT
entities.description: A distillation method where suspended materials in the soil digest are allowed to settle before an aliquot is taken.

entities.name: DISTILLATION OF AN ALIQUOT WITH SUSPENDED MATERIALS
entities.description: A distillation method where an aliquot of the soil digest is taken including suspended materials.

entities.name: DISTILLATION OF THE ENTIRE DIGEST
entities.description: A distillation method where the complete soil digest is processed.

entities.name: BLOCK DIGESTOR
entities.description: A method or tool used for the digestion of soil samples prior to distillation.

entities.name: MACRO-KJELDAHL DIGESTION
entities.description: A standard chemical digestion process used to prepare soil samples for nitrogen determination.

entities.name: TOTAL N CONTENT
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen present in the soil.
